/usr/bin/c++ -g CMakeFiles/nimrod.dir/nimrod_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nimrod.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nimrod.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nimrod.dir/src/htmlrenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nimrod.dir/src/configmanager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/nimrod.dir/src/networkmanager.cpp.o -o nimrod  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Widgets.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Network.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Gui.so.6.4.2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt6Core.so.6.4.2
